zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven於1347年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧頓時，他的父親Sir John Douglas of Lothian44歲，母親Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith39歲。他和Marjory Stewart至少有2個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1393年享年46歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven于1347年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧頓时，他的父亲Sir John Douglas of Lothian44岁，母亲Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith39岁。他和Marjory Stewart至少有2个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1393年享年46岁。

nameMeanings.name: Douglas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called from their situation on a river named with Gaelic dubh ‘dark, black’ + glas ‘stream’ (a derivative of glas ‘blue’). There are several localities in Scotland and Ireland so named, but the one from which the surname is derived in most if not all cases is Douglas in Lanarkshire 20 miles south of Glasgow, the original stronghold of the influential Douglas family and their retainers.

History: The family taking their name from Douglas in Lanarkshire were of Flemish origin. They rose to great prominence in the 14th and 15th centuries, controlling the earldoms of Douglas, Morton, and Angus, and later, Queensberry.

variants.name: Douglass
meanings: Scottish and English (Durham and Northumbria): variant of   Douglas  .

History: William Douglass, a physician recognized for his identification and description of an epidemic of scarlet fever, was born c. 1691 in Gifford, Haddington County, Scotland, and settled in Boston in 1718. The abolitionist, orator, and journalist Frederick Douglass assumed the name after escaping from slavery in 1838 and traveling to Massachusetts. Son of a white father and a slave with some Indian blood, he was born Frederick Augustus Washington Bailey c. 1817 in Tuckahoe, MD.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven was born in 1347, in Lugton, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Sir John Douglas of Lothian, was 44 and his mother, Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, was 39. He had at least 2 sons and 3 daughters with Marjory Stewart. He died in 1393, at the age of 46.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven est né en 1347, à Lugton, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Sir John Douglas of Lothian, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles avec Marjory Stewart. Il est décédé en 1393, à l’âge de 46 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven 1347 in Lugton, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Douglas of Lothian 44 und seine Mutter Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith 39. Er hatte mit Marjory Stewart mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1393 im Alter von 46 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven è nato il nel 1347 nel Lugton, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Sir John Douglas of Lothian, aveva 44 anni e il suo madre, Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie con Marjory Stewart. Morì nel 1393, all'età di 46 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochlevenが1347年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアルグトンで生まれた時，父Sir John Douglas of Lothianは44歳，母Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeithは39歳であった。彼はMarjory Stewartとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1393年に46歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven(이)가 1347년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Douglas of Lothian(은)는 44세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith(은)는 39세였다. 그는 Marjory Stewart(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1393년 46세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven nasceu em 1347, em Lugton, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Sir John Douglas of Lothian, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, tinha 39 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas com Marjory Stewart. Ele faleceu em 1393, com 46 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven родился в 1347 г. в местности лугтон, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Sir John Douglas of Lothian было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, 39. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери от Marjory Stewart. Он умер в 1393 г. в возрасте 46 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Douglas of Lugton and Lochleven nació en 1347, en Lugton, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Sir John Douglas of Lothian, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agnes Graham - Heiress of Dalkeith, tenía 39 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas con Marjory Stewart. Murió en 1393, a la edad de 46 años.
